title: Transportation Safety Plan Meeting Scheduled
summary: A public meeting to receive comments on the Kenaitze Indian Tribe’s transportation safety plan is scheduled for 1 p.m. on June 21, 2023, at the Dena’ina Wellness Center in classrooms 2 and 5. For information on the transportation safety plan, contact Brandi Bell, Elders, and Transportation Manager,...
